view.title: Validate persona scenario #3

blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step is blocked due to insufficient evidence to validate the requirement.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step is blocked due to insufficient evidence to validate the requirement.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the scenario of running a consolidated report for clients, but the evidence does not provide any confirmation of the system's behavior in this context. While the expected result states that the scenario behavior should be confirmed or produce a failure report, there is no direct evidence or outcome related to the report generation process. This lack of evidence leads to an inconclusive status regarding the validation of the requirement.
